zh.lifeSummary: 當Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn於1252年出生在波蘭奧波爾斯吉時，他的父親Władysław I Piast28歲，母親Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch29歲。他於1275年與Mrs-Mieszko I Princess Of Teschen在波蘭卡托維其吉波維亞特 希n斯吉結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1315年6月27日在波蘭盧貝爾斯吉武可福澤洛可姆拉波茲南享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn于1252年出生在波兰奧波爾斯吉时，他的父亲Władysław I Piast28岁，母亲Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch29岁。他于1275年与Mrs-Mieszko I Princess Of Teschen在波兰卡托維其吉波維亞特 希n斯吉结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1315年6月27日在波兰盧貝爾斯吉武可福澤洛可姆拉波茲南享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: Mainly North American: transferred use of the surname, derived from a medieval given name representing a Norman French alteration of the Old English personal name Wīgheard, from wīg ‘war’ + heard ‘hardy, brave, strong’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn was born in 1252, in Opole, Poland, his father, Władysław I Piast, was 28 and his mother, Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch, was 29. He married Mrs-Mieszko I Princess Of Teschen in 1275, in Cieszyn, Katowice, Poland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 27 June 1315, in Poznań, Serokomla, Łuków, Lublin, Poland, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn est né en 1252, à opolskie, Pologne, son père, Władysław I Piast, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mrs-Mieszko I Princess Of Teschen en 1275, à Powiat cieszyński, katowickie, Pologne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 27 juin 1315, à Poznań, Serokomla, Łuków, lubelskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn 1252 in opolskie, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Władysław I Piast 28 und seine Mutter Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch 29. Er hat 1275 in Powiat cieszyński, katowickie, Polen Mrs-Mieszko I Princess Of Teschen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 27. Juni 1315 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Poznań, Serokomla, Łuków, lubelskie, Polen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn è nato il nel 1252 nel opolskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Władysław I Piast, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Mrs-Mieszko I Princess Of Teschen nel 1275, nel Powiat cieszyński, katowickie, Polonia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 27 giugno 1315, nel Poznań, Serokomla, Łuków, lubelskie, Polonia, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszynが1252年にポーランドオプオルスキで生まれた時，父Władysław I Piastは28歳，母Eufemia Princess Of Kalischは29歳であった。1275年にポーランドカトウィクイポウィアト シエスズイnスキでMrs-Mieszko I Princess Of Teschenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1315年6月27日にポーランドルベルスキlウクoウセロコムラポズナnで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn(이)가 1252년 폴란드 포스키에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Władysław I Piast(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1275년 폴란드 카타윅이 파위앳 시스즈이n스키에서 Mrs-Mieszko I Princess Of Teschen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1315년 6월 27일 폴란드 루벨스키 lkow 서로코라 포즈나n에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn nasceu em 1252, em opolskie, Polônia, seu pai, Władysław I Piast, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs-Mieszko I Princess Of Teschen em 1275, em Powiat cieszyński, katowickie, Polônia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 27 de junho de 1315, em Poznań, Serokomla, Łuków, lubelskie, Polônia, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn родился в 1252 г. в местности ополски, Польша, его отцу по имени Władysław I Piast было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs-Mieszko I Princess Of Teschen в 1275 г. в местности поуят сиесзиnски, катоуикки, Польша. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 27 июня 1315 г. в местности познаn, сирокомла, lукoв, Люблінське, Польша в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duke Mieszko Piast I of Cieszyn nació en 1252, en opolskie, Polonia, su papá, Władysław I Piast, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Mrs-Mieszko I Princess Of Teschen en 1275, en Powiat cieszyński, katowickie, Polonia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 27 de junio de 1315, en Poznań, Serokomla, Łuków, lubelskie, Polonia, a la edad de 63 años.
